personal.name: Girish Watwani
personal.role: AI Full Stack Engineer | LLM & Agentic Systems

experience.role: AI Full Stack Engineer | LLM & Agentic Systems
highlights: Built Node.js microservices for wealth trading journeys using resilient agentic workflows and distributed systems patterns
Implemented gold buy/sell/redeem workflows with idempotency, retries, circuit breakers, and distributed tracing
Integrated Kafka for event-driven architecture supporting high-throughput, AI-native development patterns
Developed AI speech-to-summary pipeline using Azure AI Studio and LangChain, leveraging retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) patterns and prompt engineering for contextual accuracy

Engineered production-ready MCP (Model Context Protocol) server plugins for Claude AI, including a PII Detector tool (real-time sensitive data redaction in API payloads), an Insomnia cURL Generator with one-click export to Insomnia collections, a Caveman Compressor for payload size optimization, and an Audit & Reset tool for API session lifecycle management — enabling AI-assisted API development workflows.

Designed and showcased an internal SalaryAgent concept (agentic brokerage feature) with multi-agent LangChain architecture and an interactive HTML prototype, presented to the ENBD X innovation team as a next-generation wealth management capability leveraging large language models (LLMs) and multi-agent orchestration.
Built rights issue and DCI (Dual Currency Investment) features for structured products
Set up Playwright CI/CD pipelines for automated end-to-end testing
Developed Node.js + Angular + GraphQL advisor portal
Built scalable frontend and backend solutions
